task_goal_rewrite: Wi-Fi on the Android device is turned off and disabled.

checkpoints.description: Wi-Fi toggle switch is set to the 'Off' position in the device's Wi-Fi settings screen.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing the Wi-Fi toggle in the off state within the Settings app's Wi-Fi section.

checkpoints.description: The active Wi-Fi status icon in the device's status bar is no longer displayed (or appears grayed out/inactive).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the device's status bar showing no active Wi-Fi indicator, or an inactive Wi-Fi icon.

success_rule: Both required checkpoints must be satisfied to confirm that Wi-Fi has been successfully turned off.
